cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Jennifer could have gone to the swimming pool. The problem gives me a list of events that different people saw Jennifer doing at certain times, and I need to find out the possible time window when she wasn't doing those things but could have gone swimming. Also, the swimming pool is closed after 10pm, so whatever time she went must be before that. First, I'll list out all the times Jennifer was seen doing other activities based on the information provided. 1. Jennifer woke up at 5am. That's the start
